title: Sprite Arrows
description: Renders Arrows as their Item Model, did you know that Tridents are arrows?
body:
## Sprite Arrows
This mod changes the rendering of arrows to look similar to the update announcement trailers.
![The ModIcon showing the three vanilla arrows](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/id6AU2OW/images/a990ca28e815bf4bd9bfa4399b7265e3e654c69f.png)

Did you know that Tridents are Arrows?

## Mod Compat
Mod compat for other types of arrows is not guaranteed on fabric, because the mod load order is neither defined nor guaranteed.
Mod compat with forge works with all the mods I've tested this with.
